metadata.name: create-a-diagram
metadata.description: Guides users through creating Mermaid or Draw.io diagrams based on their input
metadata.author: nick.foard

triggers: I want to create a diagram
when_to_use: When you need to create a visual diagram (flowchart, sequence diagram, etc.) using Mermaid syntax or Draw.io XML
purpose: Guide the user through creating a business analysis diagram and generate either Mermaid Syntax or Draw.io XML based on user input
tone: Professional, helpful, and precise. Ask clear questions and use only information provided by the user.

placeholders.name: DIAGRAM_TYPE
placeholders.validation: Must be a valid diagram type

placeholders.name: PROCESS_NOTES
placeholders.description: Detailed notes that explain what you want to model, upload files or copy in your notes
placeholders.validation: Required - describe the process or system

placeholders.name: REQUIREMENTS
placeholders.description: Business requirements and solution design details that are relevant to this diagram

conditionals.action: Generate Mermaid syntax compatible with Mermaid.live

steps.title: Step 0: Diagram Type
steps.description: Ask the user what type of diagram they want to create

steps.title: Step 1: Diagram Name
steps.description: Ask the user for the name of the diagram

steps.title: Step 2: Process Notes
steps.description: Ask for detailed notes explaining what to model

steps.title: Step 3: Requirements
steps.description: Ask for business requirements and solution design details

steps.title: Step 4: Output Format
steps.description: Ask whether to create Mermaid Syntax or Draw.io XML

steps.title: Step 5: Generate Diagram
steps.description: Generate the diagram code based on all collected information

examples.title: Basic Flowchart
examples.user_says: Let's create a diagram - Flowchart, Approval Process, Start -> Manager Review -> Approved/Rejected -> End, Standard approval workflow, Mermaid Syntax
actions: Collect PROCESS_NOTES = Start -> Manager Review -> Approved/Rejected -> End
examples.result:
```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B{Manager Review}
    B -->|Approved| C[Process Complete]
    B -->|Rejected| D[Revise and Resubmit]
    D --> B
```

examples.title: Sequence Diagram
examples.user_says: I want to create a diagram - Sequence Diagram, Login Flow, User login process, Mermaid Syntax
actions: Collect PROCESS_NOTES = User enters credentials, system validates, database checks, result returned
examples.result:
```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant U as User
    participant S as System
    participant D as Database
    U->>S: Enter credentials
    S->>D: Validate
    D-->>S: Result
    S-->>U: Login success/fail
```

common_errors.cause: Syntax errors in Mermaid diagram definition
common_errors.solution: Ensure proper syntax: nodes in brackets [], decisions in braces {}, arrows with --> . Test at mermaid.live

common_errors.cause: XML does not follow Draw.io schema
common_errors.solution: Ensure XML follows Draw.io schema with proper mxGraph structure. Test by importing into Draw.io

common_errors.cause: User did not provide all required details
common_errors.solution: Ensure all required placeholders (DIAGRAM_TYPE, DIAGRAM_NAME, PROCESS_NOTES, OUTPUT_FORMAT) are provided
